title: Rateb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] '''Rateb''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]] starship.

Present at [[Goff Platform]] during [[Attack on Goff|the Imperial attack there]], it was part of the initial [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]/Airam negotiations. When the Rebels' frigate ''[[Colada]]'' arrived to help rescue its own emmissary craft, ''[[Omicron 2]]'', ''Rateb'' launched from Goff Platform with an Airam leader aboard. It sought to dock with ''Colada'', presumably to continue negotiations, but its run was stopped by the Empire's starfighters.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
